issue_summary: Return DateTime not Instant from add as period is date based
javadoc_before:
/** * Adds this period to the given instant, returning a new Instant. *

* To add just once, pass in a scalar of one. To subtract once, pass * in a scalar of minus one. * * @param instant the instant to add the period to * @param scalar the number of times to add the period, negative to subtract * @return instant with the original value plus this period times scalar * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the instant is null * @throws ArithmeticException if the result of the calculation is too large */
javadoc_after:
/** * Adds this period to the given instant, returning a new DateTime. *

* To add just once, pass in a scalar of one. To subtract once, pass * in a scalar of minus one. * * @param instant the instant to add the period to * @param scalar the number of times to add the period, negative to subtract * @return datetime with the original value plus this period times scalar * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the instant is null * @throws ArithmeticException if the result of the calculation is too large */
